name: Emily focuses on sustainable housing and small multi-unit designs. She collaborates closely with developers and builders but often faces requests to design buildings that will take less time to build and be cost effective.
She wants to be perceived by her clients as the expert in all methods and products in the market place that meets the clients needs.
Age: 34 yeras Occupation: Archtect Location: Sydney More info More info
Emily feels that MMC products are cheap and not a designer quality that her clients would expect from her
Emily opens to the Dashboard and starts by selecting Watch demo video intro.
Emily sees a social media post or LinkedIn post that she clicks on to do a trial.
Emily opens to the Dashboard and starts by selecting Watch demo video intro.
Emily has been asked to complete the Construction Certificate and Occupational Certificate - Compliance Reports. Emily selects the MMC Comply modular.
Emily selects Projects and uploads her concept plans
Emily hears about MMC Build at a conference or client discussion and searches for the website for more information
Emily selects Projects and uploads her DA Approved plans and Certification documents.
Emily selects the Type of Compliance she is looking for ie: Fire Engineering Report, Section J Report, etc. and select the Run Compliance Check
Emily selects MMC Build and the saved concept plan
Emily has experience with MMC products and wants to start using the product
Emily selects MMC Build and the saved DA Approved plan
How might we address these pain points? How big is the opportunity if we correct this pain point? What are new ways to serve this person?
Emily finds MMC Build website and goes to the pricing page to sign up for a trial
Emily gets a trial acess for (10 tokens or 1 week?)

Emily answers a few questions about what she wants to do with this project. Ie: Wants a reduced delivery time? Wants a reduced project cost? Wants a repeatable design? What % of the build would you want off-site? What is the site accessibility? Wants a sustainable build? Plans are already DA Approved? Y/N

Emily runs the Optimisation run and the following appears on screen; a 3D render of the MMC products overlay on her concept design, Stats - Avg Time Saving, Avg Cost Saving, Avg Sustainability Reduction, Select button against products suggested that if deselected will change the 3D overlay and stats Paragraph justification explanation Save, Export (PDF, DWG, SKP, RVT, WORD)
Emily uses the MMC Build export to import into her CAD program to finalize for client review.

Chris focuses on sustainable housing and small multi-unit designs. He collaborates closely with developers and builders but often faces requests to design buildings that will take less time to build and be cost effective.
He wants to be perceived by her clients as the expert in all methods and products in the market place that meets the clients needs.

The form automatically is sent in a queue to be verified. Verification of ABN, ect. can be done by a AI query.
Upon approval 2 actions happen. Details of applicant is published to the Directory Email is sent to the applicant telling him that he has been approved and published to the Directory
